items.briefing:
Australian organisations have been warned that quantum computing poses a growing threat to current encryption methods, meaning sensitive data protected today could be at risk in the future as the technology advances. Separately, with the FIFA World Cup approaching, the FBI is warning of fake websites impersonating official FIFA platforms to steal money and personal details — Australians planning to purchase tickets or merchandise online should be especially cautious.

**Practical tip:** Before buying anything World Cup-related online, verify the website address carefully and only purchase through officially confirmed FIFA channels.

featured.title: Australia warned over quantum cyber security risks
featured.quote: Australia's critical infrastructure faces urgent encryption vulnerabilities as quantum computing threats emerge.
